query:
context status: - Active: 3149 — down from before (48 session entries now quarantined)
  - Quarantined: 265 — the 48 we just added plus prior quarantined entries
  - Coherence: 0.61 — confidence_freshness: 0.10 is the dominant drag; 2827 entries have stale confidence (oldest 26 days). The bugfix-426 freshness fix will improve this over time as the
  background tick refreshes scores.
  - Graph cohesion: 6.8% connected, 2936 isolated — removing 48 session entries from active will improve this (they were never going to get edges); the true baseline is now cleaner
  - Embedding consistency: 1.0 — clean after the quarantine
  - Stale confidence: 2827 — background maintenance will handle these automatically now that the 1-year half-life is in effect

entries.title: ADR-007: NLI-Derived Auto-Quarantine Uses a Higher Confidence Threshold
co_access promotion SELECT missing quarantine-status filter causes compaction/promotion oscillation
ADR-002 correction: prune pass and heal pass are also unconditional since bugfix-444 (supersedes #3559, #178)
ADR-001 bugfix-458: GRAPH_EDGES compaction must filter on status != 3 (quarantined), not just entry existence
